title: 01784_A_Fully_First-Order_Method_for_Stochastic_Bilevel_Optimization
positive_examples: The proposed Fully First-order Stochastic Approximation (F2SA) method can be applied to important applications such as meta-learning, hyper-parameter optimization, and model selection, which can enhance the performance of machine learning models in various domains.

Demonstrated superior practical performance of F2SA over existing second-order based approaches on MNIST data-hypercleaning experiments, potentially improving data cleaning processes in machine learning.
